sections.name: Front Matter (Cover, Copyright, Contents)
sections.notes: Manual TOC lives on pages 3-5; use as cross-reference for later extractions.

sections.name: Overview
sections.notes: Top-level description of what the node does.

sections.name: 1 About LCC (Definitions)
sections.notes: Defines Producer/Consumer terminology that underpins event role classification.

sections.name: 2 Signal LCC Features and Electrical Specifications
3 Line Details (Consumer/Producer)
topics: command vs indication events on a line
sections.notes: Critical for classifying Port I/O Line Command (C) vs Indicator (P) events.

sections.name: 4 Connections and Indicators
sections.notes: Hardware wiring; Virtual Code Line button procedure is a recipe candidate.

sections.name: 6 Input/Output Configuration
sections.notes: Maps to CDI segments 'Node ID' and 'Port I/O-1'. Source for input/output mode field, command/indicator event roles, and field-level relevance (Output Function vs Input fields).

sections.name: 7 Signal LCC Logic (Conditionals)
sections.notes: Maps to CDI segment 'Conditionals' (32 Logic replication). Strong relevance rule territory (Function selection gates Variable/Action behavior).

sections.name: 8 Masts (Rule to Aspect)
sections.notes: Maps to CDI segment 'Rule to Aspect' (8 Mast replication). Mast Processing field gates the rest of the mast (relevance rule). Lamp Selection enum aligns with #1..#16 lamp names used in Brightness/Direct Lamp Control.

sections.name: 9 Track Circuits and Signal Lamp Wiring
topics: simulating a code line with events
sections.notes: Maps to CDI segment 'Track Circuits' (8 Circuit replication, Link Address is C). Sections 9.5-9.6 are rich recipe/example sources for profile-5.

sections.name: 10 Rules
sections.notes: Maps to CDI segment 'Rules'. Manual notes the rule sets are not implemented; useful caveat for field descriptions.

sections.name: 11 Brightness
sections.notes: Maps to CDI segment 'Brightness'. Direct Lamp Control segment (CDI) has no dedicated manual section; its purpose ('lamps not used by any mast') is described inline in the CDI and adjacent Masts/Brightness coverage.

sections.name: 12 Signal LCC compatible Input/Output Cards
sections.notes: Companion hardware. Sections describe recommended Port I/O configurations (e.g., active-low for BOD/RB-4) which are recipe inputs.

sections.name: 13 Trouble shooting
sections.notes: Not directly used by profile extractions.

appendices.name: 18 Signal LCC Work Sheets
appendices.purpose: Sample Rule Sheet (Aspect -> Lamp A/B/C/D mapping per mast) and Sample Logic Sheet (32 conditional planning grid). Useful as worked-example skeletons for profile-5 recipes.
